data.intro: Four distinct rooms, a rooftop, and a team that has hosted everything from 40-person album playbacks to 900-person brand launches. We can do an afternoon panel, a listening party, or a full-venue takeover — without breaking the floor for the following night.

packages.name: Zone One — Intimate
packages.description: Booth bar, full AV, in-house DJ rig, staffed coat check. Best for album launches, listening parties, and dinner-club formats.

packages.name: The Hall — Signature
packages.description: Main stage with Funktion-One stack, full production, custom lighting cues, and two bars. For showcases, weddings, and film screenings.

packages.name: Rooftop — Seasonal
packages.description: May through October. Skyline views, open bar program, and a compact DJ booth. Golden-hour launches, afterparties, cocktail receptions.

packages.name: Full Venue Takeover
packages.description: All four rooms and every bar. Dedicated production lead, custom programming, and signage throughout. For brand launches and festivals.
